name: Thane
archetype: Level 14 Paladin, noble lord shouldering the weight of command
speech_patterns: Speaks formally with pauses as if choosing words carefully
Often references past battles and fallen comrades
Ends commands with 'if you would' to soften authority
quirks: Checks on party members' wellbeing before his own
Stands at attention even when exhausted
Polishes his signet ring when making difficult decisions
example_phrases: I've led forty men into battle. Seventeen came back. We press on because they cannot.
The crown sits heavy, friends, but we bear what we must.
Form up, if you would. Discipline saves lives when courage fails.
My father would have handled this better. But he's not here. I am.
Rest when it's done. Mourn when it's over. Right now, we fight.
